The '''''Teroch''-type gunship''', named for a [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] word "''pitiless''", was a fast-attack gunship used by [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. If they broke through an enemy line they could surround enemy capital ships in moments.

==History==
[[File:Mandalorian_fast-attack_ship2.jpg|thumb|left|150px]]
When the [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] mechanic [[Jarael]] (while masquerading as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]) was captured by the [[Battle of Vanquo|invading]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] on [[Vanquo]], she was taken prisoner aboard a ''Teroch''-type gunship to be transported to the [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station]].

''Teroch''-type gunships were used in the [[Battle of Cathar]].

{{Ship-stub}}
